title: glandularia humifusa
intro: Glandularia humifusa, also known as trailing gilia or prairie gilia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the grasslands and prairies of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Glandularia humifusa include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against oxidative stress. Glandularia humifusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
